label: Squarish 3BR / baths DISTRIBUTED, private L-WRAP with west-flank HALL — standard pair stacked on the west flank (br2 front, br3 rear), master wraps the rear-center with ensuite against the kitchen wall; great_room + kitchen hold the front-right/rear-right corner (gr style). Maximum bedroom separation; suits corner lots.

adjacencies.note: ensuite is an alcove on master's east side — interior door from master
ensuite shares the kitchen's west wall — first wet stack at the rear-right
br2 door opens south into the hall
br3 door opens north into the hall
the hall elbows east at its rear end to reach master's front wall — master's door does NOT face the great_room
common T&B sits east of the hall in the middle band — second wet stack
bath block buffers br2 from the great_room
hall's east face is an open mouth into the great_room (codebase rule: hallway↔great_room is always open)
great_room + kitchen are one open LDK (gr style); kitchen at the rear of the public corner

soft_proximities.note: keep the shared bath near the rear standard
pull the second wet stack toward the kitchen run where the shell allows

lot_adjustment_profiles.name: compact_sq_l_wrap_baths_ds_hall_gr
lot_adjustment_profiles.rationale: Same tier shape as hall_core (#1). The L-wrap carries the longest hall of the family, so the hall floor (0.95 m) is the constraint most often hit; if the elbow to master cannot hold 0.95 m clear, fall back to front_back_split (#3).

notes: 3BR squarish catalog topology #4 — private L-WRAP. Natural floor band
~94-108 m²; minimum feasible shell ~9.5 x 10.0 m. The roomiest parti of the
four — pick it when the brief values bedroom separation over floor economy.
Layout intent (canonical, brief.carport_side='right'):
Rear:  [br3   | master : ensuite | kitchen ]
Mid:   [HALL | common  | great_room        ]
Front: [br2   | great_room (entry)         ]
Program: the private zone forms an L — standard pair stacked on the west
flank (br2 front-left, br3 rear-left) with the hall between them, master
wrapping the rear-center. The public gr corner (great_room hosting entry,
kitchen behind it) fills the front-right/rear-right. The hall runs
north-south between the standards, mouths east into the great_room, and
elbows east at its rear end to pick up master's door and the common T&B.
Separation: master shares NO wall with either standard bedroom — the widest
acoustic split available in a squarish 3BR shell (multi-generation briefs,
rentable-room briefs).
Corner-lot fit: bedrooms hold the west + rear walls, public holds front +
east — on a corner lot orient the public corner to the street intersection
and every habitable room still gets an outdoor wall. No landlocked rooms.
Plumbing: distributed — ensuite rides the kitchen wall (stack 1), common sits
mid-band off the hall (stack 2, softly pulled toward the kitchen).
Watch-outs: longest hall of the family (~3.5-4.5 m incl. elbow) and the
elbow constraint in the compact profile. When brief.carport_side='left',
mirror the topology.
